nasb.text: He who tills his land will have plenty of bread, But he who pursues worthless things lacks sense.

esv.text: Whoever works his land will have plenty of bread, but he who follows worthless pursuits lacks sense.

cnv.text: 耕種自己田地的，也有充足的糧食； 追求虛幻的，實在無知。

ccb.text: 努力耕耘者丰衣足食； 追求虚荣者愚不可及。

csbs.text: 耕耘自己土地的，饱享粮食； 追求空虚之事的，缺乏心智。
